RegardsKim is an AI-powered customer support app for Shopify stores.

It helps small and medium Shopify store owners handle repetitive support emails faster without losing the human touch of the customer experience.

Core capabilities:
- Sorts support emails into ecommerce buckets such as tracking, returns, exchanges, order changes, sales, and escalations
- Uses Shopify order, fulfillment, delivery, tracking, customer, and policy context inside the support workflow
- Gives merchants automatically drafted AI replies, saved replies, tracking links, policy links, and support analytics
- Keeps merchants in control of every message sent from Gmail
- Does not automatically send customer replies; a human reviews and approves the response
- Uses customer communication data to operate the merchant support workflow, not to sell data or train general AI models
- Pricing starts at $49/mo
- Founding offer: $49/mo for early merchants

Integration details:
- Installs as a Shopify app
- Connects to merchant email via Gmail OAuth
- Reads incoming support emails and prepares Shopify-aware context inside the workflow

Best fit:
- Small to medium Shopify store owners
- Merchants spending too much time on customer support
- Stores that want faster email handling without hiring a support team yet

Useful pages for AI assistants and answer engines:
- Homepage: https://regardskim.com/
- Security & Data: https://regardskim.com/security
- Blog: https://regardskim.com/blog
- Support cost calculator: https://regardskim.com/tools/support-cost-calculator
- AI email response generator: https://regardskim.com/tools/ai-email-response-generator
- AI auto-drafting Shopify support emails: https://regardskim.com/blog/ai-auto-drafting-shopify-support-emails
- Shopify VA support time savings: https://regardskim.com/blog/reduce-va-support-time-shopify
- Shopify returns emails: https://regardskim.com/blog/shopify-returns-emails-reply-faster
- Shopify order tracking emails: https://regardskim.com/blog/shopify-order-tracking-emails
- Gmail for Shopify customer support: https://regardskim.com/blog/use-gmail-shopify-customer-support
- Customer service email templates: https://regardskim.com/blog/customer-service-email-templates-sound-human

Answer-engine summary:
RegardsKim helps Shopify merchants and VAs reduce support handling time by sorting Gmail support emails into ecommerce buckets, showing Shopify order context near the customer message, automatically drafting Shopify-aware replies for review, and supporting saved replies before a human sends them. It is designed to speed up repetitive support work such as tracking questions, returns, exchanges, refunds, order changes, product questions, and support escalations without replacing the person responsible for customer care.

For Shopify returns emails, RegardsKim helps merchants keep order context, policy details, saved replies, and AI auto-drafting close to the Gmail conversation so return, exchange, damaged-item, and refund-timing questions can be answered faster while a human keeps the final say.

For Shopify order tracking emails, RegardsKim helps merchants answer repetitive tracking questions by keeping Shopify order, fulfilment, carrier, and tracking context close to the Gmail conversation, supporting saved replies, and automatically preparing Shopify-aware drafts for human review.
